PADMODAYA

Elevations — R1

Ramakrishnaraj Nagar, Madipakkam – 600091

Concept

The design focuses on a tropical, sustainable, and minimal residential elevation that maximizes natural sunlight and ventilation. Integrated green spaces enhance the connection with nature while maintaining a clean and elegant aesthetic, creating a bright, comfortable, and environmentally responsive living environment.

Baseline

Original Plan

The baseline elevation as per the original design specifications, establishing the foundation for our design evolution.

Current Direction

Current Plan

The base build elevation reflecting the current design direction, optimized for construction and functionality while maintaining aesthetic excellence.
